label: FAIL
rationale: ProgrammaticResetEnable defaults to FALSE in the TPerInfo preconfiguration, and FALSE means TPER_RESET is not enabled. The target TPerReset returns SUCCESS instead of being aborted at the interface level.

label: PASS
rationale: The trajectory successfully sets TPerInfo column 8 to 1 before the target, which proves ProgrammaticResetEnable TRUE. With TPER_RESET enabled, the source requires the TPer to accept and acknowledge it at the interface level, matching SUCCESS.

label: FAIL
rationale: ProgrammaticResetEnable is set TRUE and a session is opened before TPerReset. The reset succeeds, so all open sessions SHALL be aborted before the next command; the subsequent in-session Get returning SUCCESS is therefore not protocol-compliant.
